items.raw_desc: WC-tisztító BROS Microbec, 750 ml:BROS Microbec toilet gel is primarily intended for cleaning sanitary facilities where biodegradable septic tank contents are regularly used, also in facilities that are combined with a sewage treatment plant. It very effectively removes dirt, deposits, limescale and eliminates unpleasant odours. Regular use minimises the risk of sewer pipe blockages, septic tank fouling and also supports the operation of domestic sewage treatment plants. BROS Microbec toilet gel has an exclusive gel formula that is enriched with effective and active enzymes. As a result, the natural bacterial flora in the tank is not damaged. In addition, it creates the perfect environment for the exponential growth and multiplication of bacteria that are positively active in septic tanks and sewage treatment plants. Kiemeli a természetes árnyalatokat, és ideális a szín felélénkítésére és az első ősz hajszálak elfedésére.
